$comment: ContextOS MCP client config template. The 'contextos' server exposes team context/codebase to any MCP host (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code). The others are integrations ContextOS's hub manages. Replace ${VARS} with secrets from your environment/secret manager — never commit real tokens.

contextos.description: Query team context, ask the codebase, record decisions, load context bundles.

postgres.description: Read-only DB access via parameterized queries.
